TargetName: Supply and install two 5-tonne overhead cranes on trolley
Statement: This deliverable implements SOW-0067 as assigned in the project decomposition scope ledger.
Notes: FACT. Parent anchor to SSOW node. Confirmed in decomposition scope ledger (SOW-0067 -> PKG-016 -> DEL-016-01).

TargetName: Deliver a code-compliant fully functional maintenance shop addition
Statement: This deliverable supports OBJ-001: functional maintenance shop with all specified equipment operational.
Notes: FACT. Objective trace. Confirmed in decomposition objective-package mapping and deliverable table.

TargetName: Install and commission all mechanical systems to operational readiness
Statement: This deliverable supports OBJ-004: cranes are a primary material handling system.
Notes: FACT. Objective trace. Confirmed in decomposition objective-package mapping (OBJ-004 -> PKG-016).

TargetName: Install and commission all electrical systems to operational readiness
Statement: This deliverable supports OBJ-005: crane power circuit is part of electrical scope.
Notes: FACT. Objective trace. Confirmed in decomposition objective-package mapping (OBJ-005 -> PKG-016).

Statement: Structural crane runway must be installed and inspected before crane installation can proceed. Crane runway beams and structural supports are provided by PKG-011 / DEL-002-07.
EvidenceQuote: Structural crane runway installed and inspected (STRUCT-001)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite STRUCT-001. Structural runway completion gates crane installation. Also referenced in Datasheet Section 3.2 and Specification REQ-016-01-11.

Statement: Dedicated electrical power circuit for cranes must be available at crane disconnect location before crane installation and testing. Circuit provided by PKG-015 / DEL-015-04 (SOW-0059).
EvidenceQuote: Dedicated electrical power circuit for cranes available (ELEC-001)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite ELEC-001. Electrical circuit availability gates crane energization and testing. Also in Datasheet Section 2.3 and Specification REQ-016-01-12.

Statement: Building envelope must be closed (walls and roof complete) before crane installation can commence to protect equipment and allow safe work.
EvidenceQuote: Building envelope closed -- walls and roof complete (SITE-001)
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite SITE-001. Building closure gates crane installation. Also in Specification REQ-016-01-13.

Statement: Crane span (runway-to-runway dimension) must be determined by structural engineer in crane support design (DEL-002-07) before the procurement RFQ can be issued.
SourceRef: Datasheet.md > Section 2.2 Physical/Geometric Attributes > Crane span
EvidenceQuote: TBD -- to be determined by structural engineer in crane support design (DEL-002-07)
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface: crane span data required FROM structural design before procurement. Also referenced in Procedure Step A1 and Guidance Section 2.2.

Statement: Voltage and amperage for crane circuit must be confirmed in electrical design (DEL-004 series) before crane procurement (selecting correct crane model) and electrical coordination.
EvidenceQuote: TBD -- to be confirmed in electrical design (DEL-004 series)
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface: voltage/amperage data required from electrical design for crane model selection. Referenced in Procedure Step A4 and Guidance Section 2.3.

Statement: Crane Contractor must provide wheel load data and rail requirements to Structural Engineer for incorporation into DEL-002-07 crane support design before structural runway drawings are finalized.
EvidenceQuote: Forward selected crane supplier load data sheet to Structural Engineer
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface: this deliverable produces crane load data that structural design consumes. Also in Guidance Section 2.2.

Statement: Crane Contractor must provide electrical load data (kW voltage current phase) to Electrical Engineer for circuit sizing in DEL-004 series and panel schedule.
EvidenceQuote: Forward crane supplier electrical data to Electrical Engineer
Notes: FACT. Explicit interface: this deliverable produces electrical load data that electrical design consumes. Also in Guidance Section 2.3 and Specification REQ-016-01-12.

Statement: Crane commissioning completion enables operator training to be scheduled. Training cannot begin until cranes are installed and operational.
EvidenceQuote: Notify downstream parties: operator training can now be scheduled (OPS-001)
Notes: FACT. Explicit handover. OPS-001 is referenced in Specification Section 1.3 and Datasheet Section 4.1 as downstream. TargetType=UNKNOWN because OPS-001 is not a deliverable ID in the decomposition.

Statement: Crane equipment specs must be available for maintenance planning. Maintenance scheduling requires receipt of crane equipment specifications.
EvidenceQuote: Notify MAINT-001 responsible party: crane equipment specs available for maintenance planning
Notes: FACT. Explicit handover. MAINT-001 is referenced in Specification Section 1.3 as downstream. TargetType=UNKNOWN because MAINT-001 is not a deliverable ID in the decomposition.

Statement: Documentation package from crane commissioning is submitted to Project Manager and incorporated into project closeout package (PKG-020 / DEL-020-03).
EvidenceQuote: Confirm documentation is incorporated into project closeout package (PKG-020 / DEL-020-03)
Notes: FACT. Explicit handover of documentation artifacts to closeout deliverable.

Statement: Alberta Safety Code inspection and permits required before commissioning can be declared complete. Non-compliance blocks occupancy and commissioning sign-off.
EvidenceQuote: The crane installation shall adhere to all Alberta Safety Codes applicable to lifting equipment
Notes: FACT. Explicit constraint. Also referenced in Guidance Section 2.5 and Procedure Step D3. Safety code compliance is non-negotiable per source.

Statement: RFP Section 3.4 defines the primary design requirements for crane quantity (2) capacity (5 tonne) trolley mechanism and three-phase power. These requirements are mandatory inputs that constrain crane procurement.
SourceRef: Specification.md > Section 2.1 > REQ-016-01-01 through REQ-016-01-05 Source references
Notes: FACT. RFP S3.4 is the governing requirements document for this deliverable. Referenced across all four source documents as the primary authority for crane specifications.

Statement: Appendix B floor plan defines crane positions in main shop bay and constrains building dimensions (130 ft x 100 ft) and ceiling height (35 ft) which directly constrain crane selection.
EvidenceQuote: Floor plan showing crane positions and building dimensions (130 x 100) 35 ceiling
Notes: FACT. Appendix B is a key constraint document for crane geometric parameters and installation layout. Referenced in Datasheet Specification and Guidance.
